info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: GawAdikAryArTam ayaM pUrvam (816) ityatra anUditaH asti  Dvanayedityadantasya DvaneH Sabde DvanecCapi ' (Slo. 126) iti devaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: apapUrvasyAsya cCAndogyopanizadi prayogaH- 'apaDvAntaM varuRasya' (2.22.1) visvaro gAnaviSezaH
